title: ITS Portal workflow registry
description: Single source of truth for the workflow SET (safety | progress | future). Read by BOTH runtimes: TypeScript (src/forms/registry.ts -> the form-builder workflow selector + the submitter picker tabs + worker/publishValidation.ts validateCategory) and Python (shared/form_category valid-set + safety_reports/publish_manifest.apply_publish). ROUTING (workflow id -> Smartsheet workspace + WeekSheetConfig + intake flag) is NOT here -- it stays Python-side keyed by id (it needs live sheet IDs). Adding a workflow = a new entry here + one Python routing binding. Lives at safety_portal/ (NOT forms/) so the forms/*.json glob never mis-ingests it.

default.description: The workflow a form falls under when its catalog `category` is absent (the registry.ts `?? safety` / form_category DEFAULT_CATEGORY contract). MUST equal one of workflows[].id.

id.description: Stable workflow slug; matches the catalog parent `category` values + the Python routing keys.

label.description: Display name shown in the form-builder selector + the submitter picker tabs.

display_order.description: Sort order for the selector + tabs.
